_note: ORIGINAL content. javascript.info and Eloquent JavaScript informed topic coverage only; no prose, examples, or exercises were copied.
title: Functions
summary: Package reusable behavior with inputs and returned results.
refresher: Parameters receive arguments, and `return` sends a result to the caller. Local variables stay inside their call. Braced arrow functions need an explicit return.

blocks.body: Parameters receive arguments, and `return` sends a result to the caller. Local variables stay inside their call. Braced arrow functions need an explicit return. Package reusable behavior with inputs and returned results.

Calling a function creates a local workspace for its parameters and variables. Arguments fill the parameters, statements run in order, and `return` sends one result back while ending that call. If execution reaches the closing brace without return, the result is `undefined`.

blocks.caption: The arguments fill two parameters, and return supplies the finished label.
Return a calculation when another part of the program needs it.

blocks.body: In the corrected call, `a` receives two and `b` receives three. The expression produces five, return hands five to the assignment, and `result` stores it. Printing can happen later without tying the function to one display choice.

blocks.title: Check the boundary
blocks.body: Console logging displays a value but does not return it; a function without return evaluates to `undefined`.

blocks.why: The function prints five but reaches its end without returning a value.
The expression-bodied arrow returns automatically; the braced choice omits return.
